summary: Tested Bible compliance fixes (iteration 224). All 5 features verified working: TODAY endpoint, NOTIFICATIONS endpoint, Location fix (no Mumbai default), Non-location intents skip Places, TICKETS/Services API.
critical_code_review_comments: TODAY endpoint (lines 21417-21625) correctly returns urgency dashboard with urgent/due_today/awaiting_you summary
NOTIFICATIONS endpoint (lines 21632-21742) correctly returns user notifications with unread_count
Location fix at line 5803-5818 correctly skips Places search when no city available, sets mode='clarify'
Second location fix at line 13839-13844 also correctly skips Places when no user_city
Non-location intents (health checkup, schedule vaccination) correctly return 0 places
